narrative:
Conotton Valley-Union Local Sd (Harrison) school district has 2,110 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
